status.constitutionalAuthorityStatementText:
[Congressional Record Volume 172, Number 114 (Tuesday, July 14, 2026)]
[House]
From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]
By Mr. VAN ORDEN:
H.R. 9665.
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to the following:
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to Article I, Section 8, Clause 1 of the Constitution (the
Spending Clause), which authorizes Congress to provide for
the common defense and general welfare of the United States,
together with Article I, Section 8, Clause 18 (the Necessary
and Proper Clause), which authorizes Congress to make all
laws necessary and proper for carrying into execution the
powers vested in the Government of the United States.
[Page H4467]

latestAction.text: Referred to the House Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
